headline: Jim Cramer: I like GE Vernova very much, they should split it
summary: Jim Cramer got a call on his show recently from “Clay in California” who casually mentioned he was up 900% in Nvidia and 500% in Apple. Cramer’s response? “Who am I to even opine?” But opine he did, and his take on GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) is worth unpacking. “I like the stock very much. They ... headline: MIT Leaders for Global Operations announces three new industry partnerships
summary: MIT Leaders for Global Operations Internships at Elite Partner Companies The MIT Leaders for Global Operations (LGO) collaborates with the MIT Sloan School of Management and the MIT School of Engineering to deliver an interdisciplinary Engineering-MBA dual degree program. The two-year curriculum features internships at elite partner companies. Students develop leadership skills for the pharmaceutical, manufacturing, energy, technology, and global supply chain industries, among others. (Photo cre

thumbnail.caption: The MIT Leaders for Global Operations (LGO) collaborates with the MIT Sloan School of Management and the MIT School of Engineering to deliver an interdisciplinary Engineering-MBA dual degree program. The two-year curriculum features internships at elite partner companies. Students develop leadership skills for the pharmaceutical, manufacturing, energy, technology, and global supply chain industries, among others. (Photo credit: nathaphat/iStock)
